payloads.text:
Acknowledged. Proceeding with the established delegation and daily update cadence:

- Marketing Joke cadence: weekly, Mondays at 11:30 AM PST, with 2 OC-flavored rotating jokes preloaded; current post kept as kicker
- Daily Update cadence: 08:45 AM PST daily in the group channel; real-time replies to mentions
- Deliverables in flight: scheduling confirmations, draft jokes for Joke 1 and Joke 2, and status reports from Task-Rabbit

If you want any adjustments (tone, references, times), say the word and I’ll apply before finalizing.
